completeness.notes: Covers the 5 endpoints used by the curated tool layer. Same surface served on two hosts (arbitrum-api.gmxinfra.io / avalanche-api.gmxinfra.io); the tool layer constructs a Client per chain. Response bodies use additionalProperties: true since GMX docs do not publish strict schemas. /orders may currently 404 against the live API for accounts with no open orders — preserved here to keep parity with the existing surface.
